# makeAssignedWorkDocument(id:)

**Instance Method**

Create a new instance of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignedWorkDocument] based on this assignable document.

## Declaration

```swift
func makeAssignedWorkDocument(id: String) throws -> AssignedWorkDocument
```

## Parameters

- **id**: The identity to assign to this document.

## Return Value

A work document based on this assignable document.
title: makeAssignedWorkDocument(id:)
